title: IMMZD18SDTPOnTimeStart ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SDTPOnTimeStart ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First DTP dose from the primary series w.en: First DTP dose from the primary series was administered

Second DTP dose from the primary series.en: Second DTP dose from the primary series was administered
Second DTP dose from the primary series was administered

Third DTP dose from the primary series w.en: Third DTP dose from the primary series was administered. The primary DTP series has been completed

The primary DTP series has been complete.en: The primary DTP series has been completed

First tetanus and diphtheria booster dos.en: First tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered

Second tetanus and diphtheria booster do.en: Second tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered

Third tetanus and diphtheria booster dos.en: Third tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered. Tetanus and diphtheria immunization schedule has been completed

The primary DTP series has been complete.en: The primary DTP series has been completed and client's age is between 1 and 6 years

Pertussis-containing booster dose was ad.en: Pertussis-containing booster dose was administered. Pertussis immunization schedule has been completed
